title: WHERE ... IN Returning Unexpected Row
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 Int32, c2 String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c1;
CREATE TABLE t2(c3 Float64, c4 Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY c4;
INSERT INTO t1(c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'A'), (2, NULL), (3, 'B');
SELECT c2 FROM t1 WHERE (c2 IN (SELECT c3 FROM t2));
key_bug_features: c2 IN (SELECT c3 FROM t2) evaluation error
